country_attribution: multi (b): a video is counted in every country whose search surfaced it; no per-country ranking (unreliable)

top_videos_by_views.title: Neymar & Mavie Are Always There for Each Other... ❤️
top_videos_by_views.narration_en: This heartwarming video captures Neymar's daughter Mavie supporting her father, trending across Canada, England, and South Africa. Fans praised the father-daughter bond and Neymar's role as a dad, despite some doubts about the video's authenticity.

top_videos_by_views.title: Haaland Let Mbappé Think He Won 😏💀 #football #haaland #parody
top_videos_by_views.narration_en: This AI-generated parody featuring Haaland and Mbappé has gained traction globally. Viewers are split between amazement at the AI technology and criticism regarding the uncanny valley and fake content.

top_videos_by_views.title: Ganhei o Ingresso mais Raro da Copa do Mundo da FIFA 2026 #ad
top_videos_by_views.narration_en: Trending in Iran, this video showcases a rare 2026 World Cup ticket, sparking excitement for the tournament. Comments reflect a mix of congratulations, shared enthusiasm, and suspicion that the ticket might be fake.

top_videos_by_views.title: Shakira and Burna Boy perform Dai Dai at FIFA World Cup 2026 Opening Match!
top_videos_by_views.narration_en: Shakira and Burna Boy's World Cup opening performance trended widely across many countries. Most fans praised the iconic collaboration, though some noted issues with lip-syncing and rehearsals.

top_videos_by_views.title: Yamal Hit Haaland’s Hand by Accident 🔨😱 #football #haaland #parody
top_videos_by_views.narration_en: This surreal AI parody involving Yamal and Haaland trended in numerous countries including Spain and Japan. Audiences largely focused on the humor of the animation while expressing concerns about the quality of AI-generated content.

top_videos_by_views.title: POV: World Cup Iconic Moments ⚽🔥
top_videos_by_views.narration_en: This video recreating iconic World Cup moments via AI trended in several Western and African nations. Viewers praised the technology used to visualize history, while some debated the intensity of certain player actions.

top_videos_by_views.title: ⚽️🌍 DAI DAI FIFA World Cup 2026 (English Translation + Lyrics) Shakira
top_videos_by_views.narration_en: This lyrical breakdown of the 2026 World Cup anthem trended in Paraguay. Fans expressed excitement for the tournament and appreciation for Shakira, while also discussing the multilingual lyrics and checking for inaccuracies.

top_videos_by_views.title: Ronaldo Emotional Moments | Portugal vs Argentina World Cup Penalty Shootout 2026 #shorts #football
top_videos_by_views.narration_en: An emotional edit of Ronaldo and Messi during a 2026 World Cup shootout trended globally. While viewers empathized with the players, many pointed out that the footage was fake or heavily edited.

top_videos_by_views.title: Nora Fatehi, Vegedream and Sanjoy perform Siir Siir at FIFA World Cup 2026 Opening Match in Canada!
top_videos_by_views.narration_en: The World Cup opening performance by Nora Fatehi, Vegedream, and Sanjoy received overwhelmingly positive feedback. Fans highlighted the cultural diversity of the act and the pride taken in their national artists.

top_videos_by_views.title: POV it's Argentina vs Brazil 🥶 #football #ronaldo #messi #neymar
top_videos_by_views.narration_en: This POV animation of the Brazil-Argentina rivalry trended in many regions. Comments centered on the intense historical rivalry and shared respect for legends, with some humor regarding modern players.
